mission.title: vault: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend
mission.description: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend. Requested by 17+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the fix for v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend
steps.description:
Related: https://github.com/hashicorp/go-secure-stdlib/pull/80

The issue is because of how awsutil is used to derive credentials.  The NewCredentialsConfig constructor method needs to be called instead of starting with an empty struct.  The logic to determine which method to use to derive
```yaml
2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy="" https_proxy="" no_proxy=""
Error initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated.
    For verbose messaging see aws.Config.CredentialsChainVerboseErrors
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Related: https://github.com/hashicorp/go-secure-stdlib/pull/80

The issue is because of how awsutil is used to derive credentials.  The NewCredentialsConfig constructor method needs to be called instead of starting with an empty struct.  The logic to determine which method to use to derive credentials has been moved from GenerateCredentialChain to NewCredentialsConfig.
codeSnippets:
2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy="" https_proxy="" no_proxy=""
Error initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated.
    For verbose messaging see aws.Config.CredentialsChainVerboseErrors

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
